The God of Me

Before there was time, there was breath.

A novel · Max Sharp

Begin receiving The Hidden Chapters —
the lost canon beneath the book.

Ten dispatches from before the world. One at a time. Nothing else — no noise, and you can leave whenever you like.

The story

Two spirits, born before the world began — one of fire, one of light.

Sol was made with a question he could not put down: what am I for. Luna could lean toward a barren world and whisper it into bloom. They fell in love in the space before the first star, and a dying sun made them the colors of what they felt — and then the long forgetting began.

The God of Me is the first book of a six-part mythic saga: a story of purpose and shadow, of a love that has to cross a whole mortal life to find its way home, and of a small white moon hung in the sky to guide the forgotten back to the one who waits.

The reader's gift

Ten

The Hidden Chapters

Ten chapters that did not survive the novel's final cut — the canon beneath the story. How the two spirits took their colors. The one who was born into shadow. The voice that once called the lost ones home. They exist in no edition of the book. They arrive only here, one at a time, for those who cross the threshold.

  • Delivered by email, one new chapter each week
  • Each a complete story — read in a single sitting
  • Found in no version of the novel, anywhere
  • Yours to keep; leave the moment you wish

From the illustrated edition

Paintings that move

The novel carries original full-color plates. In the enhanced edition, a few of them breathe.

The book

Read The God of Me

Pre-order where available. Subscribers hear the moment it opens.

The saga

Six books. One love, carried across the making and unmaking of worlds.
Some things are not invented. They are remembered.

Cross the threshold

The God of Me · Max Sharp
